{{Quote|Blast it, Gerdy! I told you not to use priority frequencies to call that female on Aduba-4!|An Imperial [[Major/Legends|Major]], to Gerdy|<ref name="marvel60" />}}
'''Gerdy''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial officer|officer]] stationed on the remote outpost of [[Spindrift]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Gerdy was in a relationship with a woman on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aduba-4]], and often broke Imperial regulations by calling her on priority frequencies. Gerdy was present on Spindrift when the outpost was [[Skirmish on Spindrift|attacked]] by disguised [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces flying [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. Although Gerdy attempted to escape he found all paths cut off, and joined the rest of the surviving Imperial garrison in surrendering to the Rebels.<ref name="marvel60" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gerdy appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 60|''Star Wars'' 60]], written by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel60" />
